hero_subtitle: Low-cost, AI-powered real-time detection system protecting airports, borders, ports, and energy facilities.
hero_subtitle_h2: Passive RF Drone Detection for Critical Infrastructure
features_subtitle: Everything you need to monitor, track, and secure your airspace
feature1_desc: 433–900 MHz frequency scanning using low-cost RTL-SDR sensors.
feature3_desc: Real-time anomaly detection and threat scoring on the edge.
feature5_desc: Instant SMS/email alerts for unauthorized drones.
feature6_desc: Automatic SALUTE reports for security operations.
feature7_desc: Scalable multi-node deployment for large areas.
feature8_desc: Review past flight paths and incidents with detailed timeline replay controls.
services_subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for all your aviation monitoring needs
service1_desc: Complete control and monitoring of your designated airspace with real-time data.
service2_desc: Instant notification and response system for critical situations and threats.
service3_desc: Detailed analytics and reporting for data-driven decision making.
about_title: SkyGuardian was founded to solve a critical gap
about_desc1: traditional radar systems cannot effectively detect small, low-altitude drones near sensitive infrastructure.
about_desc2: We developed a passive RF-based, edge-AI system that requires no active emissions and works even in GPS-denied or communications-degraded environments.
about_benefit1_desc: State-of-the-art monitoring systems with AI-powered analytics
about_benefit2_desc: Instant updates and live tracking for immediate decision making
about_benefit3_desc: Meets all EU and international aviation regulations
about_benefit4_desc: 24/7 dedicated support team ready to assist you
cta_subtitle: Join hundreds of organizations trusting SkyGuardian for their aviation monitoring needs.
footer_desc: Advanced airspace monitoring and management solutions.
modal_demo_desc: See SkyGuardian in action. Fill out the form below.
modal_contact_desc: Get a custom quote for your organization.
blog_subtitle: Latest news, technology updates, and security protocols from SkyGuardian.
about_hero_title: Passive RF Drone Detection for Critical Infrastructure
about_hero_subtitle: Low-cost, AI-powered real-time protection for airports, borders, ports, and energy facilities.
about_story_p1: SkyGuardian was born from a clear need: traditional radar systems are too expensive and complex for most critical infrastructure operators.
about_story_p2: We developed a passive RF-based solution using low-cost RTL-SDR hardware and edge AI to detect unauthorized drones in real time — without relying on heavy infrastructure.
contact_subtitle: Global support for local airspace security.
upload_text: Tap to browse or drop your CV here
career_p: We are always looking for RF engineers, AI specialists, and visionaries. Send us your CV, and let's build the future of airspace together.
